notes: [existing] means the image slot already exists in the source and needs a strong final asset.
[new] means the page/component is text-only today, but the layout strongly suggests a high-value image slot should be added.

Default visual language should match the current SVG system in public/editorial and public/hospitals: premium editorial illustration, soft sage/ivory/steel-blue palette, restrained gold accents, clean lines, no readable text, no watermarks, no gore.
For doctors, authors, and patients, prefer approved real photos. If that is not possible, use clearly illustrative portrait treatment rather than photoreal synthetic faces.

priorityScale.P0: Must-have image for first-screen trust, conversion, or SEO/share impact.
priorityScale.P1: High-value supporting image that materially improves scanability and credibility.
priorityScale.P2: Nice-to-have enrichment image or lower-impact empty-state/supporting visual.

imageRequirements.styleDescription: Flagship editorial hero illustration for the homepage; medical-travel planning dashboard, premium and calm, matching the existing SVG language.
imageRequirements.prompt: Create a premium editorial illustration for an international patient planning medical care in China, showing a consultation dashboard, hospital shortlist, travel itinerary cues, and price comparison cards; soft sage green, ivory, muted steel blue, and warm sand accents; clean vector-like shapes, high trust, no readable text, no watermarks, no gore, wide 4:3 composition.

imageRequirements.styleDescription: Brand-story hero showing coordination, transparency, and safety rather than treatment drama.
imageRequirements.prompt: Create a premium editorial illustration about transparent medical travel coordination in China: a calm operations desk, provider shortlist, compliance folder, and patient support notes; polished vector style, soft sage and ivory palette, subtle hospital and travel cues, trustworthy and professional, no readable text, no watermarks, no gore, 4:3.

imageRequirements.styleDescription: Process-led hero that visualizes the four-step patient journey from inquiry to follow-up.
imageRequirements.prompt: Create a premium editorial process illustration for a four-step medical travel journey: share case, receive options, confirm plan, travel and follow-up; use connected cards, arrows, and calm hospital-travel symbols; modern vector style, sage, ivory, muted blue palette, no readable text, no watermarks, no gore, 4:3.

imageRequirements.styleDescription: Travel-planning hero centered on treatment-first logistics, not leisure tourism.
imageRequirements.prompt: Create a premium editorial illustration for medical travel support in China, showing an airport transfer plan, recovery-friendly hotel shortlist, appointment calendar, and document folder; treatment-first travel tone, soft sage and sand palette, clean vector style, no sightseeing clichés, no readable text, no watermarks, 4:3.

imageRequirements.styleDescription: Privacy-safe social-proof hero using quote cards, milestones, and trust signals instead of generated patient faces.
imageRequirements.prompt: Create a privacy-safe editorial illustration for international patient testimonials, showing verified quote cards, travel milestones, treatment folders, and trust badges without identifiable faces; warm but restrained, premium medical-travel tone, soft sage, ivory, muted blue palette, no readable text, no watermarks, 4:3.

imageRequirements.styleDescription: Comparison hero for partner hospitals in Shanghai and Beijing with strong institutional trust cues.
imageRequirements.prompt: Create a premium editorial illustration comparing trusted hospitals in Shanghai and Beijing, with exterior campus architecture, international reception desks, and subtle accreditation motifs; clean hospital design, daylight, calm and credible, soft sage, ivory, blue-gray palette, no readable text, no watermarks, 4:3.

imageRequirements.styleDescription: Recovery-friendly accommodation hero with quiet, medical-adjacent hospitality cues.
imageRequirements.prompt: Create a premium editorial illustration of a recovery-friendly hotel stay for medical travelers in China, showing a calm room, blackout curtains, elevator access cues, and easy hospital transfer planning; refined vector style, soft sage and ivory palette, no tourism clichés, no readable text, no watermarks, 4:3.

imageRequirements.styleDescription: Contact hero focused on responsive communication channels and personalized planning.
imageRequirements.prompt: Create a premium editorial illustration for a medical travel contact page, showing email, WhatsApp, patient notes, and treatment planning cards in a clean communication hub; trustworthy, responsive, modern vector style, soft sage, ivory, muted blue palette, no readable text, no watermarks, 4:3.

imageRequirements.styleDescription: Data-led pricing hero that makes cost comparison feel transparent and premium.
imageRequirements.prompt: Create a premium editorial illustration for transparent medical pricing in China versus UK and US, showing clean comparison cards, budget tiers, and timeline cues; data-visual but elegant, soft sage, ivory, muted blue palette with restrained gold highlights, no readable text, no watermarks, 4:3.

imageRequirements.styleDescription: Transport hero centered on airport pickup and hospital-first routing.
imageRequirements.prompt: Create a premium editorial illustration for airport transfer coordination for medical travelers in China, showing an arrival board feel, vehicle route, luggage, and hospital drop-off planning; polished vector style, calm and reliable, soft sage, ivory, muted blue palette, no readable text, no watermarks, 4:3.

imageRequirements.styleDescription: Documentation-focused hero with travel checklist and compliance cues.
imageRequirements.prompt: Create a premium editorial illustration for a China medical travel visa and preparation guide, showing a passport, clinic itinerary, checklist folder, and travel documents without official seals or readable text; refined vector style, soft sage, ivory, muted blue palette, no watermarks, 4:3.

imageRequirements.styleDescription: Dynamic procedure hero template; should feel procedure-specific but still non-graphic and high trust.
imageRequirements.prompt: Create a premium editorial medical-travel illustration for {procedureTitle} in China, showing a consultation setting with subtle procedure-specific equipment and planning documents; calm, clean, non-graphic, no surgery in progress, no blood, soft sage, ivory, muted blue palette, no readable text, no watermarks, 4:3.

imageRequirements.styleDescription: Dynamic city-guide hero blending skyline recognition with hospital/travel utility.
imageRequirements.prompt: Create a premium editorial illustration for medical travel in {cityName}, combining recognizable city skyline cues with hospital access, hotel stay planning, airport transfer, and treatment itinerary cards; elegant vector style, soft sage, ivory, muted blue palette, no readable text, no watermarks, 4:3.

imageRequirements.styleDescription: Hospital identity image shared across hero and overview; architecture or reception scene with institutional credibility.
imageRequirements.prompt: Create a premium editorial architectural illustration of {hospitalName} in {cityName}, showing the exterior campus or international reception area, daylight, clean modern healthcare design, subtle specialty cues for {hospitalSpecialties}, high trust, no readable signage, no watermarks, wide composition.

imageRequirements.styleDescription: Verification-led ledger graphic with document audit and registry cues.
imageRequirements.prompt: Create a premium editorial illustration for doctor and hospital verification, showing a credential ledger, registry checks, verified badges, and structured compliance cards; clean vector style, soft sage, ivory, muted blue palette, no readable text, no watermarks, wide format.

imageRequirements.styleDescription: Operational transparency banner with metrics and quality indicators.
imageRequirements.prompt: Create a premium editorial illustration for a trust dashboard, showing response-time metrics, quality charts, and monthly operational scorecards in a calm compliance design; polished vector style, sage, ivory, muted blue palette, no readable text, no watermarks, wide format.

imageRequirements.styleDescription: Budget-planning banner with low/median/high estimate logic visualized cleanly.
imageRequirements.prompt: Create a premium editorial illustration for a full medical travel cost calculator, showing low, median, and high budget cards, treatment cost, hotel, flight, and follow-up expense blocks; elegant vector style, soft sage, ivory, muted blue palette with restrained gold accents, no readable text, no watermarks, wide format.

imageRequirements.styleDescription: Safety-screening banner that feels clinical and responsible, not alarming.
imageRequirements.prompt: Create a premium editorial illustration for pre-travel eligibility screening, showing a calm medical checklist, safety filter, and physician-clearance cues; reassuring but serious, no fearmongering, vector style, soft sage, ivory, muted blue palette, no readable text, no watermarks, wide format.

imageRequirements.styleDescription: Service-level banner emphasizing response commitments and safety workflow.
imageRequirements.prompt: Create a premium editorial illustration for a post-operative support SLA, showing escalation timing, response workflow cards, and a calm safety shield motif; high-trust compliance look, vector style, soft sage, ivory, muted blue palette, no readable text, no watermarks, wide format.

imageRequirements.styleDescription: Case-center banner built around dossiers, timelines, and total-spend breakdowns.
imageRequirements.prompt: Create a premium editorial illustration for real medical case studies, showing a casebook, timeline cards, treatment milestones, travel planning, and total cost breakdown blocks; documentary but polished, no patient faces, soft sage, ivory, muted blue palette, no readable text, no watermarks, wide format.

imageRequirements.styleDescription: Detail-case cover image should feel privacy-safe and documentary, focused on the patient journey rather than the patient's face.
imageRequirements.prompt: Create a privacy-safe editorial illustration for the case study '{caseTitle}', showing an anonymous international patient journey in {cityName}, treatment milestones, travel folder, follow-up notes, and cost tracking; calm documentary tone, no identifiable face, no readable text, no watermarks, soft sage, ivory, muted blue palette, wide format.

imageRequirements.styleDescription: Editorial-hub banner that visually organizes content by country, budget, and timeline.
imageRequirements.prompt: Create a premium editorial illustration for a medical travel content hub, showing article cards grouped by country, budget, timeline, and procedure type; smart editorial system feel, clean vector style, soft sage, ivory, muted blue palette, no readable text, no watermarks, wide format.

imageRequirements.styleDescription: Category-specific banner that can shift emphasis by topic while staying within the same editorial system.
imageRequirements.prompt: Create a premium editorial illustration for the medical travel article category '{categoryName}', using category-relevant cues such as cost comparison, planning, dental, LASIK, health checkup, cosmetic, or visa logistics; refined vector style, soft sage, ivory, muted blue palette, no readable text, no watermarks, wide format.

imageRequirements.styleDescription: Primary blog cover that must support article SEO/share previews and long-form reading context.
imageRequirements.prompt: Create a premium editorial cover illustration for the article '{postTitle}', focused on {postCategory} with {postCountryFocus} and {postTimelineFocus} cues where relevant; polished medical-travel editorial style, soft sage, ivory, muted blue palette, no readable text, no watermarks, non-graphic, 4:3.

imageRequirements.styleDescription: Smaller derivative blog cover image for listing cards; should crop cleanly and remain legible at card size.
imageRequirements.prompt: Create a premium editorial thumbnail illustration for the article '{postTitle}', designed to read clearly in a card grid; simple focal composition, topic-specific medical-travel cues, soft sage, ivory, muted blue palette, no readable text, no watermarks, 4:3.

imageRequirements.styleDescription: Editorial-team banner with review-lab and content integrity cues.
imageRequirements.prompt: Create a premium editorial illustration for a medical content review team, showing an editorial lab, review workflow, compliance notes, and article quality controls; calm authority, clean vector style, soft sage, ivory, muted blue palette, no readable text, no watermarks, wide format.

imageRequirements.styleDescription: Card portrait for author/reviewer profiles; should feel credible and editorial, not like generic stock headshots.
imageRequirements.prompt: Create a refined editorial portrait illustration for {authorName}, a medical content author or reviewer with the role {authorTitle}; waist-up, neutral background, confident but understated, premium magazine illustration feel, soft sage, ivory, muted blue palette, no readable text, no watermarks, 4:5.

imageRequirements.styleDescription: Larger profile portrait for the author detail page, suitable for trust-building and profile recognition.
imageRequirements.prompt: Create a premium editorial profile portrait for {authorName}, showing a medical-travel editor or reviewer in a calm professional setting; elegant, trustworthy, non-generic, soft sage, ivory, muted blue palette, no readable text, no watermarks, 4:5.

imageRequirements.styleDescription: Trust-center overview banner combining safety, credentials, privacy, and pricing transparency.
imageRequirements.prompt: Create a premium editorial illustration for a healthcare trust center, combining doctor verification, hospital credentials, privacy handling, pricing clarity, and safety pathways in one coherent dashboard scene; clean vector style, soft sage, ivory, muted blue palette, no readable text, no watermarks, wide format.

imageRequirements.styleDescription: Workflow-driven banner for drafting, review, and scheduled updates.
imageRequirements.prompt: Create a premium editorial illustration for a medical content editorial policy, showing drafting, medical review, and scheduled updates as a clean workflow board; compliance-driven but modern, soft sage, ivory, muted blue palette, no readable text, no watermarks, wide format.

imageRequirements.styleDescription: Change-log banner with version history and dated update cards.
imageRequirements.prompt: Create a premium editorial illustration for a content update log, showing a version ledger, dated update cards, and review checkpoints; structured, transparent, clean vector style, soft sage, ivory, muted blue palette, no readable text, no watermarks, wide format.

imageRequirements.styleDescription: Privacy/compliance banner with secure data-flow cues and dossier styling.
imageRequirements.prompt: Create a premium editorial illustration for healthcare privacy and cross-border data handling, showing secure dossiers, permission-controlled data flow, and deletion-request workflow cues; calm compliance feel, soft sage, ivory, muted blue palette, no readable text, no watermarks, wide format.

imageRequirements.styleDescription: Terms/commercial process banner built around service scope and scheduling logic.
imageRequirements.prompt: Create a premium editorial illustration for medical travel service terms, showing quote boundaries, scheduling flow, cancellation logic, and agreement folders in a clean structured layout; polished vector style, soft sage, ivory, muted blue palette, no readable text, no watermarks, wide format.

imageRequirements.styleDescription: Clinical-boundary banner emphasizing safety, escalation, and non-diagnostic content.
imageRequirements.prompt: Create a premium editorial illustration for a medical disclaimer page, showing a safety shield, escalation pathway, and clear boundary between educational content and physician-led care; serious but calm, soft sage, ivory, muted blue palette, no readable text, no watermarks, wide format.

imageRequirements.styleDescription: Reusable procedure thumb for homepage and any future procedure grids; needs a single strong focal visual per treatment type.
imageRequirements.prompt: Create a premium editorial thumbnail for the procedure {procedureTitle}, showing subtle equipment or care-setting cues relevant to the treatment, but no gore and no surgery in progress; simple focal composition, soft sage, ivory, muted blue palette, no readable text, no watermarks, 4:3.

imageRequirements.styleDescription: Reusable hospital thumb focused on place identity, reception quality, and credibility.
imageRequirements.prompt: Create a premium editorial hospital thumbnail for {hospitalName} in {cityName}, showing either the campus exterior or the international patient reception area; clean architecture, daylight, high trust, soft sage, ivory, muted blue palette, no readable signage, no watermarks, 4:3.

imageRequirements.styleDescription: Reusable case-study thumb that communicates journey, outcome, and privacy safety without fake patient glamour shots.
imageRequirements.prompt: Create a privacy-safe editorial thumbnail for a medical travel case study, showing an anonymous patient journey with treatment folder, travel itinerary, and follow-up milestones in {cityName}; documentary and calm, no identifiable faces, soft sage, ivory, muted blue palette, no readable text, no watermarks, 4:3.

imageRequirements.styleDescription: Homepage city-guide card image that distinguishes Shanghai and Beijing at a glance while keeping the medical-travel framing.
imageRequirements.prompt: Create a premium editorial city-guide thumbnail for medical travel in {cityName}, combining skyline cues, hospital access, hotel stay planning, and airport transfer hints; elegant vector style, soft sage, ivory, muted blue palette, no readable text, no watermarks, 4:3.

imageRequirements.styleDescription: Profile image slot for named specialists; safest as approved real photos or clearly illustrative portrait treatment.
imageRequirements.prompt: Create a clean non-photoreal editorial portrait placeholder for a specialist doctor profile, waist-up, neutral clinical background, calm and authoritative, premium illustration style, soft sage, ivory, muted blue palette, no readable text, no watermarks, 4:5.

imageRequirements.styleDescription: Simple positive confirmation image for form completion and next-step reassurance.
imageRequirements.prompt: Create a premium editorial confirmation illustration for a completed medical inquiry, showing a checked care-plan folder, calm support cues, and a reassuring success state; minimal and warm, soft sage, ivory, muted blue palette, no readable text, no watermarks, 4:3.

imageRequirements.styleDescription: Graceful empty-state visual that fits the brand without feeling playful or childish.
imageRequirements.prompt: Create a premium editorial empty-state illustration for a page not found experience on a medical travel site, showing a misplaced document, route map, and subtle search cues; calm, refined, trustworthy, soft sage, ivory, muted blue palette, no readable text, no watermarks, 4:3.
